creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to geraud from comment #2)

Thank you for the detail Geraud.

So to clarify (I missed the interpretation from comment 0 referencing "greater than"), the the bug, other than the version spec not matching upstream, is a missing = in `gssapi>1.6.14` requiring a higher (currently non-existent) version.

Attachment 231454 correctly resolves both issues.

Quarterly [1] is not affected.

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/databases/py-mysql-connector-python/Makefile?h=2022Q1
